description_cn:
使用4d旋转的任何几何图形的3d莫比乌斯变换。

莫比乌斯指环（一种拓扑学结构）。可以想象一下，整个空间围绕设定的圆进行旋转，转化量则是控制停在旋转的某一刻。
description_en:
3D Möbius transformation of any geometry using 4D rotation.

A Möbius ring (a type of topological structure). Imagine the entire space revolving around a predetermined circle, with the transformation controlling the point at which the rotation stops.

parameters.name: C
parameters.desc_cn: 定义变换的圆。圆上的点将保持在圆上，所有其他点将被拉过并绕着圆旋转。
parameters.desc_en: Circle defining the transformation. Points on this circle will stay on it, and all other points are pulled through and around it

parameters.name: T
parameters.desc_cn: 变换量。2π 使其恢复到原始状态。
parameters.desc_en: Amount of transformation. 2π brings it back to the original

parameters.name: Q
parameters.desc_cn: 此参数控制绕圆轴的旋转。设置为 1 表示等倾角旋转。
parameters.desc_en: This parameter controls the rotation around the axis of the circle. Set to 1 for Isoclinic rotations

parameters.name: F
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为真，此操作将变换并缩放几何体，使输入圆所定义的球面上的点始终位于该球面上。
parameters.desc_en: If true, this transforms and scales the geometry so that points on the sphere defined by the input circle stay on that sphere

author: Kangaroo Team
